regime_change_rationale: Multi-timeframe regime contradiction activates mechanical mean reversion. 4H RSI overbought (70.32) vs 1D RSI depressed (33.23) with 4H price below EMA200 (-2.16%) while 1D above (+7.69%) creates structural friction.
